name: Just Dance VR – Welcome to Dancity

reviews.review_description: I played all of their songs in a few days. There are only a few songs on which make me sad because they have hundreds of songs on the Nintendo. It is definitely not worth 30$ or your time. Just dance, I’m sorry but you’re kind of a disappointment.👎🏻👎🏻Please come out with more songs!
there are very few songs. I thought maybe there's at least a store to get more but there's not

So the songs are good but there's not enough. I bought this thinking it was like the og "just dance" from the wii but its not. I ask that more songs are added so the game is worth the amount of money spent.

reviews.review_title: Are we sure this is a Just Dance game?!
reviews.review_description:
I have been waiting since the original Quest for a Just Dance! VR game to be made. So was extremely excited whenever I came across it. That excitement lasted all about five minutes. The first major disappointment: after buying an entering the game, I thought to myself, ”Wow! So few song choices. Well, I’m sure I’ll be able to buy an expansion pack or unlock more songs through missions.” That was a BIG NOPE! Then came the second major disappointment: again, thinking to myself, “ Okay, so surely since I can’t buy or unlock more songs they’re gonna update the playlist/song choices ￼every so often right?” Once again a GIANT NO! 

Had I known that the game was going to be so basic I’m not so sure that I would have spent $20 on it even though it is one of my favorite games on other platforms. I’ve been very disappointed in this purchase and sadly after playing all levels/songs available it’s frankly pretty boring afterwards

I bought this game thinking I was gonna be able to experience just dance in a whole new level. Oh boy was I wrong you barely get any songs there was literally only 2 songs that I liked and if you read the description it lists the songs and says many more which is a lie worst game i ever played I regret buying this

It’s not THAT bad.. 1000% lacking songs I could clear that within an hour. The song choices are somewhat decent.? I like the fact they have dark horse but thats the only song I like either way it’s still decent. I do feel like the tracking movement stuff is lying to me? My mom was literally horrible at the game and still got 5 stars at one of the dances 😭 kinda feels like I could still get 5 stars by doing nothing. JUST ADD MORE SONGS PLEASEEE 😭😭

A just dance game with songs you can count on two hand is already crazy, ok then probably a list that changed weekly ? Nope . Ok so dlc songs kind of cashgrab but at least they’re there ? 2x nope . Oh oh I know songs added by the community as mods ? lol not even close. So no song ? YES and 20 bucks thaaaannk u.  Buy this game if you want to show to your friends and family that money is but a concept that you DO not care about

reviews.review_title: As a long time Just Dance Fan…
reviews.review_description:
This game is a great game to play!

I’ve been playing Just Dance since Just Dance 2 on the Wii and playing on the VR headset is a new way to experience the game! 

Tracking on songs are really good to almost perfect, each song has a really cool atmosphere to 
To change the feel of the game! Definitely worth getting if you love Just Dance! 

The cool little mini games you can do in the Dancity part of it helps make the game feel like a real world!

Also being able to customize your apartment is a fun little thing you can do also!

reviews.review_title: Good, but... do I need to say anything?
reviews.review_description: I bought this game last year when I was 15, I thought it was good I looked at the reviews I thought they were just hatin' I've been a just dance fan since I was 6 during the teasers and early gameplay since just dance 2017, but this game really makes me think about just dance... for starters, the update on creating your avatar is gone, don't most vr dance games let you freely customize how you look? NOT WELCOME TO DANCITY THO! Why are there avatars already made by the game, but not by the player?! Secondly, the songs... the low amount of songs I've seen in a just dance game, I've seen dance central and samba de amigo song lists be longer than this game, oh and also there's already avatars for "woof" and "chichika" WHY ADD THE AVATARS FROM THE SONG BUT NOT THE SONG UBISOFT!? istg I'd rather play just dance on my Nintendo and dance central on an Xbox instead of an crappy just dance game

reviews.review_title: Got as a Christmas present, don't buy
reviews.review_description: I got this as a Christmas present, at first I was so excited since I've played just about every version of the game, but I am honestly so disappointed in this one. Almost no songs for the full price is just absolutely ridiculous. Not worth it, if I had known how few songs there were before redeeming the card for this, I would have told the one who gifted it to me to take it back and get their money back! I was thinking there would at the least be some DLC or songs to unlock as you played, but no, what you see is what you've got. Very disappointed.

Okay, more of a 4-star game, but relative to the other VR dance games, it deserves 5 stars.

I've tried other VR dance games like Dance Eden (good but buggy) and Trip the Light (that's a cool one, check it out), and rhythm games with a dancing element to it like Audio Trip while dancing with Goldie and Synth Riders. I've also done OhShape while following a suggesting on another review to put it in no fail mode at the hardest level (didn't like it).

While I LOVE those rhythm games, none really feel like dancing. The other actual dance games have an avatar you follow. That's just kinda depressing. That's fine, even desirable, for workout dance VR classes (which I do all the time), but that's really about doing repetitive dance moves that get your heart rate up. FitXR has great Zumba and other dance classes that are good for working out if that's what you're looking for.

But if you really want to... just dance, you should follow a real person. Plus, Just Dance VR has that crazy, fun environment that the Just Dance series is known for.

One reviewer said there are only 8 songs... I counted 25.

There are a ton of Just Dance games on your typical gaming platforms and I counted about 40-60 songs on average for each. They first cost about $60-50 to later be discounted to about half that. So 25 songs isn't that bad for $30, but it should be discounted to $15 by now.

Tracking sucks as it really is more of a Kinect game. Your VR headset won't track your feet and the game doesn't track your hands that well. But it gives you the benefit of the doubt so, as far as I can tell, you really can't fail at dancing and just enjoy yourself.

The multiplayer/social aspect appears to be dead.

One thing I wish they had done is take advantage of the 360 view of your VR headset. For example, have it so that some dance moves rotate you to the left and your instructor is still visible so you don't lose a beat. This would have made it feel more organic and fun like dancing in a club.

-Sadly they removed that you can customize your costume (but still advertise that you can)...I worked hard for those, who has them now?
-need more songs, even if it's dlc.
-they finally fixed song of the week!

Read the reviews and listen to the community. I hate that I bought this game but I love it and love the series it’s truly a shame you published an unfinished game and won’t consider updating it. I can understand why this game is so poorly rated smh. Didn’t want to have to leave a 1 star review, but if the company won’t listen, I have to.
You all actually took stuff OUT of the game?? As everyone says the selection is bare but now you've also taken away custom avatars.

I love Just Dance. I was very excited to see it for VR. I bought it as soon as it came out. But there isn’t enough content. They’ve not added a single new song. I don’t know why they would release a product that they don’t seem to want to enhance. Especially something so many people love and have followed for decades. I would suggest not buying this product unless you like doing the same songs forever.

reviews.review_title: No Just Dance 2026 maybe no updates ever
reviews.review_description: It’s fun but it’s not really part of just dance without more songs/updates/new years. I reached out to Ubisoft and asked them directly if they plan on adding more songs or if 2026 was coming to VR. They gave me the run around (acting like they didn’t understand  the very clear and direct question I asked) and after about 5 messages back and forth they told me there are no updates as to whether or not they will add more content. It’s a really fun game for VR but really crappy not saying if they’re going to add more, seems like that means they’re not but they still want people to spend $30 on it. Just Dance 2026 just came out this month but no mention of anything new for VR.
Can we connect our just dance account here to have access to everything like the switch?

I wish I had checked the reviews before buying the game. No good songs and the moves are wack. I felt no enjoyment playing; I wish I could get a refund because it’s wayyy overpriced for what you’re getting.🥲

I love the game, it’s  looks great and it got good graphics and the colors are really nice 
But I believe they should add more dances to this game like how are you gonna release this game with a very few dances and people probably don’t know half of the dances on there, it’s fun to play but it’s get tiring if we have to play the same dances over again when they could have added all of the other dances thats been made over the years.
They should have just hold onto the app and added more dances to it before just releasing it with a small amount of dances to chose from

I really wish the developers would bring back "happy hour" and the chance to dance with hundreds of people from around the world. That was my favorite part of "Just Dance"—the competition and the joy of having people from all over join in during happy hour. Ever since they removed that feature, I've been hoping each year for its return. I was certain it would make a comeback with the VR release, but I'm disappointed it hasn't. I’m staying optimistic for the next “just dance”release. 🥺

I got this game on sale for $15 bucks and I’ve already had many hours of fun! The backgrounds are so cool and while all the songs wouldn’t be my first choice they are all really fun and well done. I like that there are different styles of dance and each song has a different background. I like that the aesthetics of each artist are well aligned to the real artist in the dance, style, and backgrounds. Overall I am having so much fun with this game and I’m really happy I bought it! :)

I grew up with just dance and I was happy there was a vr game of it . The only problem is that there is not much songs I suggested they should add just dance ￼ unlimited or more songs otherwise it’s great  
￼
I don’t know why Ubisoft won’t release more songs for the VR. It makes no sense to only have 25 songs and not allow even a DLC. People would spend the money if you’d just drop more music for this!

I got this game right when it came out a long time ago. It is a lot of fun. I wish it had more tracks to download as DLC because the song list is short. It has a few challenging songs to get a 5 star on but most are easy as the game tends to be forgiving. Dance central was my go to for exercise but the servers went down and this game got me back into VR for a while. The backgrounds and levels make this game shine in VR, they are full of effects and cool detailed music video style sets. The game play is pretty standard to this series and isn't 3D which is a little bit of a let down coming from Dance central to this but I'll take it because it really is a full blown AAA title on my Quest 2 and I was just torn up about my favorite game being destroyed. Thanks for filling the gap. Anyway this is a nice game to own in your collection as a mainstream standard that everyone knows and most people love.
It’s really cool but definitely need more veriety of songs, like bad romance and timber etc! Other than that really good game I’d recommend.
We've had it for 3 days and regret getting it.  Hardly any songs,  and hasn't changed much from years passed.

While I enjoy the gameplay, I find the limited selection of songs makes the experience feel less exciting and party-like. The community truly loves the game, but we believe that adding more tracks would greatly enhance the fun and keep the energy high. Please consider expanding the music library to keep us dancing longer!

I remember playing this on Wii and PS. If nothing else, just put those on this one and simply calibrate it for the new system. It can even have all the same graphics and so forth. I would love to have the oldies on here. It needs much more selection for the price.

reviews.review_title: This Is Not A Full Game
reviews.review_description: The only thing I can say is that this feels like a demo. There are hardly any songs. It's not worth paying for. As a long time Just Dance fan, I'm really disappointed.

While the game is a wonderful game to play and has 25 songs,we need more songs from popular artists like Sabrina carpenter or blackpink,that could maybe help the game a little bit.I love the game and dancing,but I believe we need more songs to dance to.Thats the only thing that I would want from the game.I know the developers love the game so much!But please add more songs for us all to dance to!

reviews.review_title: Lacking a lot of Favorite Songs.
reviews.review_description:
I started playing this app, and searched through the whole list, and found no Britney Spears and other favorites.

Sigh. Okay. I am going to dance with YouTube VR.

I had the Ubisoft Bias when I first reviewed this and it was bad. This game is not actually bad. The tracking/accuracy when you're dancing is fine and the songs featured are as well, however, the quantity, quality and pricing of the game are insanely discrepant. While the leveling is good with over 1000 levels to cover and quests making it so you essentially have to do everything to get all of the cosmetics, toys and trophies but the only 25 songs for $39.99 is absolutely greedy, even though the song selection is decent. I would wait until this game goes on a significant discount, but otherwise, this game is fun if you're a diehard Just Dance fan or a dancer who likes to dance while gaming too.
Yeah i got this for my son. But its just girls songs. Wierd!!  Plus need way more song
Hey I love Just Dance and its worth it! Better than nothing. Im being honest, I LOVE THE HARDWORK! Im not disapointed! Get the Game and enjoy it)

reviews.review_title: Don’t waste your money on this
reviews.review_description: Please give me my money back. I don’t like this game. I like that at first when I bought it but when I got it and played it for a little while they need to add more songs I want to get Rager
The game is great but we definitely need more songs.
I want to have more songs to dance
Seriously decent but needs more songs. At minimum Rasputin and vodovorot
More song options would be nice! I get bored playing the same songs! Please, please update this with new songs! It's been ages!!

So I love just dance I’ve owned all of the them for different consoles so when we got the oculus and I saw that they came out with just dance, I got super excited but honestly, I only played it for maybe three days and stopped because there’s lack of songs and it’s not as fun as the original just dance ￼
If I could have access or even purchase songs from previous just dance games I would be much happier. But the lack in song choices really makes this game get old fast and not feel worth buying.

I love Just Dance, I agree with the masses on the game needing more songs added, and the glitches need to be worked through, but my ultimate disappointment was going from my Oculus 2 to the Oculus 3, although I'm logged into my same profile NONE of your Achievements are persistent and you start over from the beginning. I'm simple, the concept of unlocking all the prizes keeps me motivated, starting from the beginning does not!!!
I enjoy the graphics and a great way to exercise. Definitely need more Songs available or a new one every week.

reviews.review_title: Lack of songs and game breaking bugs
reviews.review_description: The game can pretty much be completed in one afternoon. It definitely needs more songs, especially for the price. Today, I tried to get back into Just Dance after stepping away due to lack of variety and couldn’t even play the game. The Just Dance Central just froze about ten seconds into the song! The song went on, and the game kept telling me what moves were next, but I had no idea how to do them since the teacher was completely frozen! This is a game breaking bug since copying the teacher is literally the core mechanic of Just Dance. This makes me really disappointed because I really wanted to start playing again, but cannot. I quit the app and restarted it multiple times just to run into the same bug. :(

When it first launched i was so happy coz I taught it will have lots of songs to choose from but apparently it was the opposite.... I really regret buying these app coz I taught it was useful... I'm using more of my synthriders app coz we have lots of songs to choose and the community is really awesome....

reviews.review_title: Great App But Needs More Content
reviews.review_description: This app is incredibly fun! Unfortunately, the VR version only includes 25 songs, which feels very limited. What’s even more disappointing is that Ubisoft offers a subscription with access to over 300 songs in the same style—but it’s only available on Nintendo Switch, PlayStation 5, or Xbox Series X/S. It’s frustrating that VR users are left out of this expanded experience. Why not offer to us as well? Even if we have to pay for subscription or per package, it is worth in my opinion. Another disappointment is that this French company has grown so big, that they don't care about the customers, there is not one reply from them to our comments. They sell lots and lots of other games, the revenue that they get from this game is nothing compared to what they get from the other games. Therefore, don't expect any improvement any time soon because we are at the bottom of their priorities and I believe that they are not even reading our comments.

reviews.review_title: I get dizzy and needs passthrough
reviews.review_description:
Apart from what other have said, that there are not a lot of songs (and most of them I don't even know, so not a lot of classics), I wanted to highlight the fact that I can't teleport to places, instead I can only move as if I was walking, but that way of traveling in VR makes me dizzy right away, I could not find an option to change to teleport. So I didn't want to explore the city. 

Also, lots of the songs require lateral movements, which makes it dangerous if you don't have that much space. I have enough space, but I have found myself on the edge of my boundary many times and even hitting furniture. A bit of mixed reality can help with this.
Does not work.
None of the Songs is to my taste.

reviews.review_title: UBISOFT IM BEGGING FOR MORE SONGS
reviews.review_description: Bro just dance: welcome to dancity needs more songs like I can’t just survive on how you like that, call me maybe, thank you next, and hollaback girl forever 😭 ts is bananas LIKE THIS GAME IS WONDERFUL I COULD PLAY THIS FOR HOURS IF YALL JUST THREW MORE SONGS IN. I CAN ONLY DANCE TO THEREFORE I AM SO MANY TIMES BEFORE I GET BORED IM SORRY BILLIE BUT LIKE IVE PLAYED THE SAME SONGS 60+ TIMES EACH…

I really liked the game, it's super fun and having a legit dancing game for the VR was well needed. But I feel like they released the game and then abandoned it. I've had it since launch and they haven't added any songs since. There's only like a dozen or two choreos which is not enough. I can only play the same songs many times. Please add more songs, dang.

If you heard of just dance before, THIS IS THE PERFECT GAME FOR YOU (If you play in VR)! Seriously, these songs are immersive, a very good game mode, and the song list.

Three things I noticed:
One: No just dance+?
Two: Where is everyone? (I would go in the multiplayer plaza but I would see four or two people)
Three: lack of songs.

If you’re patient, there might have some dlcs for the future, because seriously they have been making this game since when they started (You know it takes a lot of time of making a game right?).

But Anyway, 4 out of 5 starts. (Not depending in the game score from JD 1-2016)

It's fun at first, you get to explore a little town,  and do some dancing. But once you finish the only 25 songs they have that's it. The game has been out for months and hasn't had anything added since, and for $30 it's not worth it.  It feels like yet another bad game from ubisoft and not worth the time or money you spend on it.....
I got this app thinking that Ubisoft would eventually update this with more songs since they have a ton of songs in their other games. Nope! Been months and nothing. :/.
just pls add more songs, we know that we‘re not the biggest community on vr, but plss dont forget about us and support us with updates, i want just dance + 🥲
This games lack of songs make it fun for like a week or two but only having less than 30 songs with no updated song list is not worth it. Wish I would’ve known before purchasing

Like most people have said, this game is seriously lacking in content. And sadly it seems like Ubisoft has completely abandoned it too. Which is quite a shame because the game itself is fun but it just falls flat in terms of what you can do. If even the developers themselves never play what they make then you know you’ve got a flop on your hands.
I know the vr community is smaller, but we are solid. Please add more songs to this game

Yall don’t realize how fun this game really is to the public. Not only is it a good workout—but it’s so fun! I’ve played all the songs so many times. I did not pay $30 for only a few games! PLEASE GIVE US MORE!

too boring and repetitive; would be more fun if there were many songs like what we have in JDN/just dance now😕

not worth 29.99$ for me, i’m pretty disappointed because i love just dance but please add more songs.. the whole concept is really nice though and this game would reach its full potential if it were to have lots and lots of dances. i’m pretty sure many people like me would start playing this game again once that they put more songs here soo..
I love it but 25 songs is not enough

I've loved Just Dance for a long time, and I was so excited that it was finally available on Oculus, but I am disappointed that there are only limited dances on here. I thought that I would be able to connect to my Just Dance Now account, but I can't do that, apparently.
This game would be amazing if they just added some more songs ￼

reviews.review_title: Fun? Absolutely. Worth $30 as is? Nahh
reviews.review_description:
If you love Just Dance, the Meta Quest version is a blast. The VR immersion makes you feel like a real Just Dance character, and leveling up to earn rewards is pretty easy.

That said, the customization is lacking. The avatar and outfits are basic, and while they give you an apartment, I wish it evolved with your progress.

My biggest issue? The song selection. At $30, I expected more of my favorites, or at least an option to buy or subscribe to more tracks. It would make sense for the game to be free with a few songs, offering multiplayer access and a rotating song of the week. If you’re paying full price, you should at least get to pick five of your favorite Just Dance songs from the start. Instead, I found myself pulling up Just Dance Now in my browser for variety which feels unfair given the price.
Songs are decent and enjoyable however there are small songs that are available. Please Ubisoft provide us much more content we are begging you!
There needs to be more songs added. It has gotten really boring and repetitive

Dont waste your money.. unless you want to dance to the same 5 songs, I fr spent probably 15 minutes looking for more than 25 songs. The description literally says "and many more" where tf are the many more..
The sever don’t work

reviews.review_title: Honest review - would have expected more
reviews.review_description:
For a company that made the game that defined dancing with technology I would have expected sooo much more. 

1. Biggest issue is not enough songs and no way to even buy more. It took me one full day to get through all the songs in my “room” and then another day to get good at them. That’s it 2 days and I’m done. 
2. The developers perhaps don’t play much VR only for the small fact of how the controls work. The movement of the character is so awkward and unintuitive when navigating through the game. Perhaps it’s a small thing but it’s 2025 these things should be easy. 
3. The arena area doesn’t really get full so most times there is No one to dance with. At least they could have put in a few bots to make it seem fuller. And then you just wonder around looking to dance to the same songs you have in your room. There is really no need to go to the arena at all. 
4. Trophies, backgrounds, clothes, badges - for what??  It used to be that completing a song would unlock another new song, this is worth it. But for a silly badge that has no value or a background that I cannot even use? What’s the point. 

Sorry team Just Dance, but this version is a flop and definitely not worth the money.
Favorite game but needs more songs and fix the tracking cause i’ll be doing exactly what it says and i’ll get an ok for it

This version has only about 20 songs where most all others have almost 100, and lets you unlock songs as you progress. I finished this in 1 workout. And nothing else to explore. Disappointed is an understatement.

Love the game, but are they going to add more songs in the game? I do like the ones they put in ,but I want more songs than to put the same song on repeat pls give us more songs on here cause it was worth what we pay at least put a reward song but it could be random?

We were super excited to get this game, just dance has always been a favorite. This app is fun for the first day.. but there is hardly any songs and you can't buy new songs. It got boring fast. Pretty disappointed.
It looks nice, but the song quantity is limited. There is no way to slow down the choreography to really learn the moves, like in Dance Central. The scoring system is useless.

reviews.review_title: Not good at all to move around!!
reviews.review_description:
I brought just dance on Meta Quest today. I played with it and I found it not easy for me to play with because the two controls on my hand and headset on my head, are making it harder for me to move and I don’t feel comfortable using it. I am worried that I am going to break it.

It is easier to use Just Dance on Nintendo Wii than Meta Quest because Nintendo Wii has a one-controller to use on my hand,  it is easy to use and I feel comfortable with it.

The two songs I like is in just dance in Nintendo wii.

After reading several reviews and feeling mixed about it, I decided to try it for myself. Based on my experience, I’d say it’s less about buying a rhythm game and more about enjoying a high-quality, music-synced stage performance. The visuals and effects are stunning, especially when paired with optimization software like QGO, which further enhances the experience.

If you’re expecting the precise feedback and mechanics of traditional rhythm games, you might find it lacking, as the hit feedback isn’t particularly strong. However, if you approach it as a virtual stage performance, it’s truly impressive.

With the potential to implement full hand-tracking and regularly update the song library, it could become a standout experience that attracts a lot more players.
Going to refund,  expected more content

Has your usual just dance gameplay but the vr version seems to be the best based on what I've seen from my partner playing it. No subscription nonsense is good to see and there's a lot of decent extras that you can't get on the non vr games.
Love the app, but need more songs please!!

reviews.review_title: its pretty much worst game to spent 30$
reviews.review_description: dont buy it its worst game ever with lacking content
